item.name: Meyhane Reveler
item.description:
The beauty of this saltwater fish is of great interest to the people of Thavnair─and even greater interest to travelers passing through.

[Suitable for display in aquariums tier 1 and higher.]
[Suitable for printing on small canvases.]

fish.guide: With its silvery scales and elegant movements, this wavekin invites comparison to the elegant performers that brighten Radz–at–Han's dining establishments. Mirroring its namesakes' popularity, this aquatic dancer can be seen attracting throngs at the bazaar on any given day.
